mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.type, r.target_id AS targetId, CASE WHEN r.type = 'JOB' THEN COALESCE(j.title, CONCAT('职位#', r.target_id)) WHEN r.type = 'MERCHANT' THEN COALESCE(m1.company_name, m2.company_name, CONCAT('企业#', r.target_id)) WHEN r.type = 'USER' THEN COALESCE(su.nickname, su.username, CONCAT('用户#', r.target_id)) ELSE CONCAT('对象#', r.target_id) END AS targetName, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username, '匿名用户') AS reporter, u.role AS reporterRole, r.reason, r.status, r.result, COALESCE( ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(re.file_url ORDER BY re.sort_order SEPARATOR ',') FROM report_evidence re WHERE re.report_id = r.id ), r.evidence ) AS evidence, CAST( ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'fileUrl', re.file_url, 'fileType', re.file_type, 'sortOrder', re.sort_order, 'createTime', DATE_FORMAT(re.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) ) FROM report_evidence re WHERE re.report_id = r.id ) AS CHAR ) AS evidenceFiles, r.action_code AS actionCode, r.handled_by AS handledBy, r.handled_time AS handledTime, CAST(r.target_snapshot AS CHAR) AS targetSnapshot, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report_info r2 WHERE r2.type = r.type AND r2.target_id = r.target_id ) AS reportCount,
-- JOB：岗位详情 j.title AS jobTitle, COALESCE(jm.company_name, '未认证企业') AS jobCompanyName, CONCAT_WS(' ', j.work_location, j.district) AS jobLocation, CASE WHEN j.min_salary IS NOT NULL AND j.max_salary IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(j.min_salary, '-', j.max_salary, 'K') ELSE '面议' END AS jobSalary, j.degree AS jobDegree, j.experience AS jobExperience, j.headcount AS jobHeadcount, j.status AS jobStatus, j.audit_status AS jobAuditStatus, j.description AS jobDescription, j.requirement AS jobRequirement, j.tags AS jobTags, j.category_id AS jobCategoryId, jc.category_name AS jobCategoryName, COALESCE(jm.company_logo, ju.avatar) AS jobCompanyLogo, jm.scale AS jobCompanyScale, jm.industry AS jobCompanyIndustry, CONCAT( IFNULL(jm.province, ''), IFNULL(jm.city, ''), IFNULL(jm.district, ''), IFNULL(jm.address, '') ) AS jobCompanyAddress, ju.id AS jobPublisherId, COALESCE(ju.nickname, ju.username, '招聘负责人') AS jobPublisherName, ju.avatar AS jobPublisherAvatar,
-- MERCHANT：企业详情（兼容 target_id=user_id / merchant_profile.id） COALESCE(m1.company_name, m2.company_name) AS merchantCompanyName, COALESCE(m1.industry, m2.industry) AS merchantIndustry, COALESCE(m1.scale, m2.scale) AS merchantScale, COALESCE(m1.financing, m2.financing) AS merchantFinancing, CONCAT( IFNULL(COALESCE(m1.province, m2.province), ''), IFNULL(COALESCE(m1.city, m2.city), ''), IFNULL(COALESCE(m1.district, m2.district), ''), IFNULL(COALESCE(m1.address, m2.address), '') ) AS merchantAddress, COALESCE(m1.contact_name, m2.contact_name, mu.nickname, mu.username) AS merchantContactName, COALESCE(m1.contact_phone, m2.contact_phone, mu.phone) AS merchantContactPhone, COALESCE(m1.publish_status, m2.publish_status) AS merchantPublishStatus, COALESCE(m1.audit_status, m2.audit_status) AS merchantAuditStatus, COALESCE(m1.description, m2.description) AS merchantDescription,
-- USER：账号详情 su.nickname AS userNickname, su.username AS userUsername, su.role AS userRole, su.phone AS userPhone, su.email AS userEmail, su.status AS userStatus, su.ban_status AS userBanStatus, r.create_time AS createdAt FROM report_info r LEFT JOIN job_post j ON r.type = 'JOB' AND r.target_id = j.id LEFT JOIN job_category jc ON r.type = 'JOB' AND j.category_id = jc.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ju ON r.type = 'JOB' AND j.merchant_id = ju.id LEFT JOIN merchant_profile jm ON r.type = 'JOB' AND j.merchant_id = jm.user_id LEFT JOIN merchant_profile m1 ON r.type = 'MERCHANT' AND r.target_id = m1.user_id LEFT JOIN merchant_profile m2 ON r.type = 'MERCHANT' AND r.target_id = m2.id LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON r.type = 'MERCHANT' AND mu.id = COALESCE(m1.user_id, m2.user_id) LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON r.type = 'USER' AND r.target_id = su.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.reporter_id = u.id WHERE 1 = 1
AND r.type = #{type}
AND r.status = #{status}
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
